interpretation: An unmeasured confounder would need to be associated with both DBS receipt and Δ Pain slope by an OR/RR of 1.47 (lower CI 1.26) to explain the (null) point estimate.
An unmeasured confounder would need to be associated with both DBS receipt and 12-month worsening (NP1PAIN ≥ 2) by an RR of 5.09 (lower CI 1.45) to fully explain the observed association.
